name: Dilled New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and partially pare around the centers.
2. Place them in a skillet and gently boil in salted water.
3. Cover and cook for 15 minutes, or until just tender.
4. Drain off the water.
5. Add butter and heat, shaking the pan frequently until browned.
6. Sprinkle with salt, sugar, and dill, shaking the pan to roll the potatoes in the seasoning.
7. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
8. Very Good!
